links.title: STORICO NOTTURNO
links.tooltip: Apri lo storico delle sessioni notturne

panels.description: Ultima posizione notturna stabilizzata nella sessione selezionata.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == "${session_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last()

panels.title: Posizione corrente

panels.description: Ultimo campione registrato per la sessione selezionata.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == "${session_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: int(v: r._time) / 1000000}))

panels.title: Ultima rilevazione

panels.description: Sequenza temporale delle posizioni durante la sessione notturna.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == "${session_id}") |> group(columns: []) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Posizioni durante la notte

panels.description: Distribuzione indicativa del tempo tra le posizioni rilevate; gli intervalli senza dati oltre 10 secondi vengono esclusi.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == "${session_id}") |> group(columns: ["position"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10) |> group(columns: ["position"]) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed), position: r.position}))

panels.title: Distribuzione delle posizioni

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position", start: 0)
list.label: Paziente monitorato
list.name: patient_id
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position", start: 0)

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "session_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}", start: 0)
list.label: Sessione notturna
list.name: session_id
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "session_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}", start: 0)
